modules.label: Typing Text
modules.description: Typewriter char-by-char reveal with blinking cursor

modules.label: Glitch Text
modules.description: RGB-split glitch with sine offsets + sporadic hits

modules.label: Popping Text
modules.description: Per-char spring pop-in with color cycling

modules.label: Sliding Text
modules.description: Directional slide-in with spring + fade

modules.label: Bell Curve Reveal
modules.description: Gaussian opacity envelope peaking at element midpoint — text fades in then out

modules.label: Beat Drop Words
modules.description: One word per detected beat (zeta drop). cut = hard swap, flash = decay envelope

modules.label: Fitbox SVG Word
modules.description: Full-frame SVG word auto-fit via textLength + spacingAndGlyphs

modules.label: Spectrum Bars
modules.description: FFT frequency bars driven by the audio track

modules.label: Waveform Path
modules.description: Smooth oscilloscope SVG path from live audio samples

modules.label: Bass Glow Overlay
modules.description: Full-frame color flash driven by a frequency band

modules.label: Path Reveal
modules.description: Progressive SVG path stroke-on, optional beat trigger.

modules.label: Neon Stroke Stack
modules.description: 4-layer stacked blur strokes for neon/glow, beat-flicker optional

modules.label: Sonar Rings
modules.description: Expanding rings triggered on beats/downbeats/drops

modules.label: Pre-Drop Fade + Hold
modules.description: N-beat black fade-in → M-beat hold → white flash at drop (element end)

modules.label: Watermark Mask
modules.description: Configurable opaque panel to hide a corner watermark

modules.label: Video Clip
modules.description: OffthreadVideo layer with optional beat-synced brightness boost

modules.label: Shader Pulse
modules.description: WebGL fragment shader: audio-reactive radial glow + grain. Bass = pulse size, mid = hue drift, highs = grain.

modules.label: Beat Shock
modules.description: WebGL shader: chromatic-aberration ring burst on every beat/downbeat/drop. Trail decays over ~350ms.

modules.label: Bloom Glow
modules.description: Wandering soft-glow halos (faux bloom). Size pulses with bass, brightness with mid, grain with highs.

modules.label: Beat Color Flash
modules.description: Full-frame color overlay that punches to maxOpacity on every Nth beat, fades to 0 over flashDurationSec.

modules.label: Beat Image Cycle
modules.description: Cycles through a list of images on every Nth beat/downbeat/drop with optional cross-fade.

modules.label: Beat Video Cycle
modules.description: Cycles through a list of video clips on every Nth beat/downbeat/drop. Plays muted by default.

modules.label: Glitch Shock
modules.description: Beat-triggered datamosh rectangles with RGB-offset tears. Up to 8 rects per beat, decays in 120ms.

modules.label: Speed Video
modules.description: Video clip with adjustable playbackRate + startFromSec. Chain multiple instances on the timeline for beat-ramped speed changes.

modules.label: Static Image
modules.description: Single image overlay with fit, position, width/height, and fade-in / fade-out envelopes.

modules.label: Oscilloscope
modules.description: Time-domain waveform line with optional glow. Pairs with Spectrum Waterfall for classic analyzer look.

modules.label: Plasma Backdrop
modules.description: Domain-warped noise backdrop. Flow speed = mid band, brightness = bass, shimmer = highs.

modules.label: Spectrum Waterfall
modules.description: Scrolling FFT plot — columns of frequency amplitude over time. Makes the whole track\'s structure visible.

modules.label: Motion-Blur Text
modules.description: Text swept across the frame with a procedural motion-blur trail.

modules.label: Scene Transition
modules.description: Full-screen transition effect (fade / slide / wipe / flip / iris / clock-wipe).

modules.label: Shape
modules.description: Procedural shape: circle, square, star, or triangle.

modules.label: Lottie Animation
modules.description: Lottie (Bodymovin) JSON animation playback with fade envelope.

modules.label: GIF Clip
modules.description: Animated GIF playback synchronized to the composition clock.

modules.label: Captions / Subtitles
modules.description: Caption overlay from an SRT string — active line shown at the playhead.

modules.label: Noise Field
modules.description: Animated procedural Perlin noise field as a background plate.

modules.label: Google Font Text
modules.description: Typography with a loaded Google Font (Inter, Poppins, Bebas Neue, etc.).

modules.label: 3D Object
modules.description: Real-time 3D primitive (cube / sphere / torus / cone) via Three.js + @remotion/three.
